entities.name: EVAPORATION
entities.description: The process of water transferring from the land surface to the atmosphere as vapor

entities.name: MICROMETEOROLOGICAL MEASUREMENTS
entities.description: Techniques used to measure atmospheric and surface exchange processes

entities.name: DRY SEASON
entities.description: The period of the year characterized by little to no rainfall

entities.name: SAHEL
entities.description: A biogeographic zone of transition in Africa

entities.name: SURFACE CONDUCTANCE
entities.description: A measure of the ease with which water vapor moves from the soil or vegetation to the atmosphere

entities.name: EMPIRICAL FUNCTIONS
entities.description: Mathematical models based on observed data

entities.name: SOLAR RADIATION
entities.description: The energy emitted by the sun reaching the surface

entities.name: HUMIDITY DEFICIT
entities.description: The difference between the actual vapor pressure and the saturation vapor pressure

entities.name: STANDARD CLIMATE STATION
entities.description: A facility used for collecting standardized meteorological data
